POST /profile.description: Step 1 — Takes building and community data, returns structured profile + archetype match + preliminary package

input.monthly_income_eur: number — total community fee income per month e.g. 4800
input.main_issues: array of strings — e.g. ['Poor insulation', 'High energy bills']
input.ite_iee_uploaded: boolean — whether ITE/IEE report was uploaded
input.accounts_uploaded: boolean — whether community accounts were uploaded

POST /proposal.description: Step 3 — Takes profile, fetches live Euribor from viaNexus, returns 3 financing scenarios

input.profile: object — full profile object returned from POST /profile
input.euribor_override: number (optional) — override Euribor rate for sensitivity analysis e.g. 3.89

notes.base_url_production: https://api.retrofin.ai (Scaleway — set up before demo day)
notes.sensitivity_analysis: To re-run scenarios with a different rate, call POST /proposal again with euribor_override set to new value
